free_text: TOTAL NEUTRON CROSS SECTIONS OF HEAVY NUCLEI.
USED IN MONOENERGETIC AND WHITE SOURCE MODES.
SHIELD AND COLLIMATOR USED, BEAM DIAMETER 0.5-1.0 CM.
CANNED IN 0.025-CM THICK STAINLESS STEEL SHELLS.
BLACK NEUTRON DETECTOR USED FOR ENERGIES BELOW
CARBON RESONANCES USED TO VERIFY SYSTEM PERFORMANCE AND
TO ESTABLISH ENERGY SCALE AND RESOLUTION.
IRON RESONANCES USED FOR LOW ENERGY NEUTRON SPECTRUM.
SOURCE. SEVEN SAMPLES AND VOID PLACED ON EIGHT
POSITION WHEEL WITH ROTATED STEPWISE AT 3-RPM.
